nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-vented euphonia
nodes.summary: White-vented euphonia（White-vented euphonia，学名 Euphonia minuta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于亞馬遜盆地、Várzea forest、森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There are also scattered records in Brazil to the east of its contiguous range. The white-vented euphonia inhabits a variety of humid to wet lowland forest landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones. In Central America these include the canopy and edges of rainforest. In the Amazon Basin the landscapes include várzea and terra firme forests and nearby clearings in drier forest. In elevation it reaches in northern Central America, in Costa Rica, in Colombia, in Ecuador, in Peru, in Venezuela, and in Brazil.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon in northern Central America and Costa Rica, fairly common in Colombia, "generally scarce" in Ecuador, uncommon in Peru, fairly common in Venezuela, and "frequent to uncommon" in Brazil. Because of deforestation there, "[a]ll populations [west] of Andes are worthy of investigation
